libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Set native test executable runtime/system properties for 4.2.4: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. The existing 4.2.3 test already applies these only when libraryVersion == '4.2.3.Final'; the fix should extend that setup to 4.2.4.Final or all affected 4.2.x versions. Tests should tolerate IoUring.isAvailable() being false unless a platform native classifier is deliberately added.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8594 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.netty:netty-transport-classes-io_uring:4.2.4.Final; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Full live io_uring transport requires Linux kernel support and Netty's platform native classifier artifact; the plain resolved classes artifact does not include native libraries.

Adding live native transport coverage would be environment-sensitive, so generated tests should not assume io_uring availability unless the workflow explicitly provisions the matching native classifier and platform.
Local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative for whether the JDK 25 runtime properties are sufficient.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Netty io_uring 4.2.x does not need an extra service or simple Maven dependency, but native-image runtime on JDK 25 needs Netty unsafe/reflection system properties applied for 4.2.4 as well.
